zh.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bromley of Baddington於1292年出生在英國斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利時，他的父親Ranulph de Bromley II22歲，母親Agnes Dimsdale16歲。他於1319年與Joan de Baddington在英國英格蘭爾巴丁頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1359年在英國英格蘭爾巴丁頓享年67歲。

zh-hans.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bromley of Baddington于1292年出生在英国斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利时，他的父亲Ranulph de Bromley II22岁，母亲Agnes Dimsdale16岁。他于1319年与Joan de Baddington在英国英格兰爾巴丁頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1359年在英国英格兰爾巴丁頓享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bromley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Bromley, in Essex, Hertfordshire, Kent (now in Greater London), Greater London, Greater Manchester, Staffordshire, Shropshire, and elsewhere. Most are named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, but Bromley (near Bow) in Greater London is from Old English bræmbel ‘bramble’ + lēah.

variants.name: Brimley
meanings: habitational name, perhaps from Brimley in Devon or Brimbley in Stoke Abbott, Dorset, both named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Brumley
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Bromley  . This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bromley of Baddington was born in 1292, in Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Ranulph de Bromley II, was 22 and his mother, Agnes Dimsdale, was 16. He married Joan de Baddington in 1319, in Baddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1359, in Baddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bromley of Baddington est né en 1292, à Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph de Bromley II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes Dimsdale, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Baddington en 1319, à Baddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1359, à Baddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bromley of Baddington 1292 in Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph de Bromley II 22 und seine Mutter Agnes Dimsdale 16. Er hat 1319 in Baddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Baddington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1359 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Baddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bromley of Baddington è nato il nel 1292 nel Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Ranulph de Bromley II, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Dimsdale, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Baddington nel 1319, nel Baddington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1359, nel Baddington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアアボツ ブロムリー
ja.lifeSummary: John de Bromley of Baddingtonが1292年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアボツ ブロムリーで生まれた時，父Ranulph de Bromley IIは22歳，母Agnes Dimsdaleは16歳であった。1319年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアバッドイントンでJoan de Baddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアバッドイントンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Bromley of Baddington(이)가 1292년 영국 스태퍼드실르 애벗스 브롬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph de Bromley II(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Dimsdale(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1319년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 바딩턴에서 Joan de Baddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 바딩턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bromley of Baddington nasceu em 1292, em Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph de Bromley II, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Dimsdale, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Baddington em 1319, em Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1359, em Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bromley of Baddington родился в 1292 г. в местности эббоц бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ranulph de Bromley II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Dimsdale, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Baddington в 1319 г. в местности баддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1359 г. в местности баддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Bromley of Baddington nació en 1292, en Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph de Bromley II, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Agnes Dimsdale, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Joan de Baddington en 1319, en Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1359, en Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
